item.title: Cornelius Coconut is a goofy internet “brainrot” meme character that became popular in short-form videos, slideshows, and “is calling…” memes. He’s usually shown as a coconut with a human or monkey-like face and is part of the same absurd meme universe as
item.description: By @clipfueledz: Cornelius Coconut is a goofy internet “brainrot” meme character that became popular in short-form videos, slideshows, and “is calling…” memes. He’s usually shown as a coconut with a human or monkey-like face and is part of the same absurd meme universe as
